name: E2E: an operator extends the default sources with a new URL (ESLint-style), which registers into the operator standards registry
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" 'https://team.example.com/our-standard' --id team-standard --tier 1 --dry-run 2>e.txt; grep -q 'would append id=team-standard' e.txt && grep -q 'url=https://team.example.com/our-standard' e.txt && grep -q 'STANDARDS-URLS.yaml' e.txt && echo e2e7-extensible-eslint-style 1>&2
